sourceTitle: Generative AI: Guidance for doctoral students, supervisors and examiners
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Yes, students are permitted to make use of generative AI tools in their thesis writing processes. However, where a student's use of generative AI tools in their thesis writing exceeds the circumstances permitted by this guidance, they will risk breaching the Academic Misconduct Policy.
evidenceLocator: Doctoral assessment > Are students allowed to use generative AI tools when writing their thesis?
